changes.description: Override base ProductTile to add Quick View overlay bar with hover slide-up on desktop and always-visible on mobile
Unit tests for ProductTile overlay bar: rendering, click handler, accessibility, set/bundle exclusion
Quick View modal component reusing base ProductView and useProductViewModal hook with ErrorBoundary and loading states
Unit tests for QuickViewModal: loading spinner, product view rendering, error boundary, close behavior
Playwright E2E tests for Quick View: trigger visibility, modal open/close, product content loading, keyboard accessibility
